title: Bajaj Allianz Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz Life is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
